description: Fetch trending content from a Toutiao channel. Supports 14 channels: 热点 (ranked hot list with hot values) and 推荐/财经/科技/军事/体育/娱乐/历史/美食/直播/旅游/国际/视频/北京 (article feeds). Supports cursor pagination. No authentication required.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel name. Allowed values: 热点, 推荐, 财经, 科技, 军事, 体育, 娱乐, 历史, 美食, 直播, 旅游, 国际, 视频, 北京

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's nextCursor. 0 means the first page. Only supported by feed channels; ignored by 热点.
